label: Subagent • residency direction: local→remote runs in place
query: A resident local orchestrator spawns a remote model.
notes: LIVE RESIDENCY (machine-specific). PRODUCTION path: preloads a local orchestrator so it is GPU-resident, then spawns a REMOTE target. A remote target never touches the local GPU, so SubagentResidency runs it in place (no unload) → handoffWrapped=false. Requires the remote provider connected — run the suite with a remote --model (e.g. MODEL=xai/grok-4.3) + XAI_API_KEY so the CLI bootstraps it; SKIPS (unavailable) when the local orchestrator isn't installed or the remote target isn't routable. Id is `residency-dir-*` so it stays OUT of FILTER=spawn; run with FILTER=residency-dir-.

subagent.input: Reply with a single short sentence confirming you received this task.
